executor: Cowork-Claude direct (small enough to skip Mikaela handoff)
scope: Close the CRUD loop: children + characters + stories all persist now.

modified: src/app/portal/children/page.tsx (real form replacing 'Add a child' button stub)
src/app/studio/character/page.tsx (real form replacing intent picker; ownership-verified; sandbox default)
src/app/studio/story/client.tsx (handleSubmit calls submitStoryForApproval at end of 5-act flow)

ownership_verification: All three server actions verify session.userId == child.parentId before any write. Silent no-op for non-owner.
sanitization: All child-facing strings (character name, species, role, personality traits, story title, page text) pass through lib/safety.ts sanitizeChildInput before persisting.
sandbox_default: Characters created by the kid Studio land with sandboxMode=true. They are private to the child until parent approves via /portal/approvals (dispatch 011).
story_persist: Book row created with status='awaiting_parent', BookPages with imageApproved=false. Parent must approve in /portal/approvals before status flips to 'approved'.
image_seed: createCharacter generates a deterministic base64 seed from name+species so future renders (dispatch 004) stay character-consistent.
what_user_can_do_now_end_to_end: Parent: signup → email magic link → /portal/children → 'Add child' (Eli, 5)
Kid: 'Make a character' → /studio/character → name + species + traits → save (sandbox)
Kid: 'Start a story' → 7 branching beats with live Sparky → 'Show grown-up'
Pending dispatch 004: parent orders printed book once illustrations exist
